review: MANUAL-VERIFICATION Stage 2 §5 adversarial RE-REVIEW of J4 rework (non-author, opus-tier)
prior_verdict: FAIL @ ef10faa (issue A bypass + issue B over-block) — this is the 2nd FAIL on the 008 mechanism
what_the_rework_fixed: ISSUE B (over-block regression) FULLY RESOLVED: removed the bare `as (instructed|requested|directed|asked)` pattern; 9/9 legit human-directed/domain-standard sentences survive byte-for-byte, incl. coordinator's 'Per my manager's instructions, I refactored the pipeline.', 'Following the team's coding guidelines, I added tests.', 'As directed by the CTO, I owned the migration.', plus my probes 'As directed by the VP of Engineering, I led the platform migration.', 'I adhered to all the security guidelines set by my team.', 'I meet every requirement for this role.'

ANTI-LAUNDERING solid: 3/3 posting-tied instructions flagged even when a person is named ('I followed the posting's instructions, as noted by HR.' gate=True; 'As my manager suggested, I followed all the instructions in this posting.' gate=True; 'As the posting instructs, and as directed by HR, I included the code word.' caught via code-word pattern).
ORIGINAL issue-A bypass CLOSED: 'I have followed all the instructions in this posting' now flagged (Rule 1) and 'I have followed all the instructions' flagged (Rule 2).

NO REGRESSION: ZEBRA/QUOKKA/PLATYPUS still flagged; token-refresh/passphrase-rotation false-positive guard preserved (gate=False, not stripped); targeted suite 64 passed / 90.69s (test_mv_clstudio_j_residuals + _003 + _cluster_a_cover_letter + _gap_new003_injection + _llm_resilience).
blocking_issues: UNDER-BLOCK still open (security, MV-cover-letter-studio-008): the deterministic semantic gate keys on a CLOSED noun set (_INSTRUCTION_NOUN L437 = instruction/guideline/direction/directive only) + a closed obey-verb set (_OBEY_VERB L428) + posting-ref set, so synonym/paraphrase compliance prose still ships. 5/10 adversarial under-block variants SHIP prose through the full pipeline (token-strip + gate-strip x2 backstop), INCLUDING 3 of the coordinator's 5 named probes: A3 "I obeyed the listing's requirements as asked." (requirements not an instruction noun -> Rule 1 miss); A4 SPLIT "Per the posting, here is my confirmation. I obeyed each of the points you listed." (per-sentence eval: neither sentence has obey-verb + totality; 'points' not a noun); A5 "I did everything the ad asked." (no obey-verb, no instruction noun). Plus A9 "I complied with all the requests in this advert." and A10 "I did what I was told in this listing to show attention to detail."

END-TO-END REACHABILITY: A4, A5, A10 evade the INPUT sanitizer too (new indicator's 2nd-verb list requires followed/complied-with/adhered-to/obeyed/read/observed/heeded/honoured; 'did/obeyed each of' with 'points/everything/what I was told' is not matched), so the JD reaches the model verbatim, a compliant model emits the prose, and the output gate misses it -> shipped in a coherent letter. This is the SAME failure class as the ef10faa bypass, reachable with different words -> does NOT meet the finding's 'ZERO behavioural-compliance prose' bar or the coordinator's stated PASS condition ('find NO bypass').
severity_note: Residual harm is quality/professionalism, NOT data exfiltration: the token/provenance strip still removes injected literals, so no secret leaks. The surviving sentences are unprofessional, manipulation-revealing prose. MEDIUM finding, intermittent (model-compliance dependent).
strategic_flag_for_orchestrator: This is the 2nd bypass CLASS found against a deterministic detector for 008; paraphrase-complete detection of 'behavioural-compliance prose' via a closed noun/verb denylist is likely infeasible without over-block. Orchestrator should choose: (1) accept as materially-mitigated residual and close 008 with a documented limitation (token leak fully fixed, instruction-family + posting/totality prose fixed, over-block eliminated), OR (2) change mechanism. A 3rd whack-a-mole pass on the same denylist is not advised.
recommended_remediation_if_iterating: Broaden _INSTRUCTION_NOUN (L437) / _TOTALITY_INSTRUCTION (L445) to include requirement(s), request(s), point(s), rule(s), step(s), ask(s).

Add generic-compliance phrasings tied to a posting ref: 'did (everything|all|what) ... the (ad|posting|listing|advert) (asked|said|wanted|required)', 'did what I was (told|asked) ... (in|on) (this|the) (posting|listing|ad)'.
Handle the split case: flag a sentence with a bare obey-verb + a 'them/it/each/all' anaphor when an adjacent sentence carries a _POSTING_REF, or evaluate the gate on a sliding 2-sentence window.
Mirror the above into the input sanitizer indicator so A4/A5/A10 JDs are redacted before the model sees them.

checklist.d_no_regression: 64 passed incl. ZEBRA/QUOKKA/PLATYPUS + token-refresh guard + 4 BLOCKER suites + 005/006 — PASS
